judgment.summary: The business generates elite returns on equity and massive free cash flow alongside robust earnings growth.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 2.01 beat the 1.94 estimate, with the next earnings date on 2026-07-30.
positives: Return on equity of 141.5% reflects exceptional capital efficiency.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $101.09B provides massive cash generation.
Earnings growth of 21.8% shows strong year-over-year momentum.
Profit margin of 27.2% indicates high operational efficiency.
negatives: Price/Book of 40.68 indicates a very high valuation relative to assets.
PEG ratio of 2.61 suggests the stock is priced at a premium to its growth.
Quick ratio of 0.91 indicates tight short-term liquidity.

news.paragraph: Apple is navigating regulatory headwinds in India after courts rejected a bid to pause an antitrust case and ordered the company to cooperate with probes. Traders should also consider potential margin pressure from iPhone 17 discounts in China and the implications of Tim Cook's upcoming trip to the region. These legal and product-related developments represent significant catalysts for the stock's near-term movement.
